flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at Blackfeet Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (240 vs 337).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Blackfeet Community College rose 5777% between 2022 and 2024 (1.1% → 62.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Blackfeet Community College rose 191% between 2021 and 2024 (25.8% → 75.0%).
